tagline: One local profile. One click. One clean form fill.

typography_recommendation.display_style: Tight editorial headlines with calm sentence-case body copy.
typography_recommendation.note: Use default system-safe Windows fonts unless licensed brand fonts are added intentionally.

icon_direction: Simple geometric mark with no UI screenshot inside the icon.
layout_style: Clean editorial cards with generous whitespace, thin borders, and one strong accent color.
illustration_style: No mascot. Use minimal geometric gradients and subtle product framing.
screenshot_annotation_style: Short headline plus one line of subcopy in a quiet top-left or bottom-left panel.
copy_style_rules: Lead with the one job, not a category buzzword.
Prefer literal trust claims over vague productivity hype.
Avoid fake scarcity, fake urgency, or inflated promises.
Keep overlays short enough to preserve the screenshot as the primary proof.
